home.heroBadge: Hi there — welcome to the easy way
home.heroSub: A birthday gift across town. A whole apartment across the country. A container across the ocean. CouthActs is the friendliest way to move anything, anywhere — with real humans you can trust and your money safely held until it lands.

track.title: Got a tracking code?
track.sub: Peek at your stuff right now. No sign-in, no fuss.

moving.label: Pick your vibe
moving.title: So, what are we moving today?
moving.sub: Eighteen ways to get it there. Pick the one that fits and we'll take it from there.

air.title: Up in the air
air.tagline: Window seat or window frame, we fly it.

special.title: Something special
special.tagline: The stuff other platforms won't touch.

sending.title: Sending it
sending.desc: A birthday box to mom. A forgotten charger to your partner. We'll get it there today.

moving.title: Moving in
moving.desc: First apartment, fifth house, or somewhere in between. Book verified movers with one tap.

business.title: Running a biz
business.desc: Pallets, containers, or a fleet of deliveries. Scale up without hiring a logistics team.

premium.title: Going big
premium.desc: Private jet for the weekend. Yacht for the honeymoon. Armored transport for the art. Yes, really.

step1.title: Say what you need
step1.desc: A taxi? A courier? A container ship? Tell us in your own words.

step2.title: Real people bid
step2.desc: Verified pros with real ratings compete for your job. Pick the one you like.

step3.title: Money held safely
step3.desc: Your funds sit in escrow. Nobody gets paid until you're happy.

step4.title: Watch it happen
step4.desc: Live map, photo check-ins, and a friendly ping when it arrives.

peace.label: Peace of mind, included
peace.title: We've got your back.
peace.body: Strangers on the internet? Not here. Every driver, mover, and pilot passes real ID checks. Your money is held safely until you say the word. And if something goes sideways, a real person steps in — not a chatbot.

feature1.title: Real people, real IDs
feature1.desc: Every user passes government ID checks. Ghosts need not apply.

feature2.title: Money held safely
feature2.desc: Your funds wait in escrow. The provider only gets paid when you're happy.

feature3.title: Know where it is
feature3.desc: GPS, photos, QR check-ins. Nine layers of "yep, still on track."

feature4.title: Fair if it goes wrong
feature4.desc: Real people resolve disputes within 24 hours. Funds stay frozen till it's sorted.

tracking.label: Always in the loop
tracking.title: You'll never wonder
tracking.sub: Nine ways of keeping eyes on your stuff. Quietly, in the background.

flight.title: Flight tracking
flight.desc: Follow every wing in the sky.

maritime.title: Maritime AIS
maritime.desc: Cargo ships and yacht charters on the map.

satellite.title: Satellite GPS
satellite.desc: GLONASS backup where cell won't reach.

geofence.title: Geofence pings
geofence.desc: Notified the moment it enters your zone.

pros.label: For the pros behind the wheel
pros.title: Drivers. Movers. Pilots. We built this for you too.
pros.advanceBody: Don't wait for the job to close. Elite providers can pull up to 70% of their escrow within 24 hours — so the next fuel tank, next load, next week is always covered.
pros.academyBody: Short courses. Real certifications. Bigger jobs. Level up your score and unlock the stuff everyone else can't touch.

bigOps.label: Big operations
bigOps.title: Moving more?
bigOps.body: Whether you're a Fortune 500 or a federal agency, the infrastructure scales. Same platform, serious tools.
bigOps.enterpriseBody: Volume pricing, dedicated teams, SSO, API webhooks, white-label tracking.
bigOps.governmentBody: FedRAMP-aligned controls, SAM.gov integration, full audit trail.

devs.label: Builders welcome
devs.title: Got code? Build on us.
devs.body: A clean REST API, real-time webhooks, and a playground that doesn't hate you.

finalCta.badge: Free account. No credit card. No catch.
finalCta.title: So. Ready to
finalCta.body: Sign up in under a minute. Post your first move in two more. Watch it happen from wherever you are.

footer.tagline: The friendliest way to move anything, anywhere. 18 modes, 190+ countries, and real humans you can trust.
footer.madeWithCare: Made with care in Dallas, TX
footer.address: The Adolphus Tower, 1412 Main Street, STE 609, Dallas, TX 75202

errors.notFoundSub: The page you're looking for moved, or never existed.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our side
errors.serverErrorSub: Our engineers have been pinged. Please try again in a moment.
